ddls:
CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the strategy */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strategy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the strategy (e.g., moving average, RSI) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the strategy was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the strategy */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the strategy was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "param_default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "param_min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value of the parameter */,
  "param_max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value of the parameter */,
  "param_step" REAL /* Step value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_parameters_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy the performance metrics belong to */,
  "combination" INTEGER /* Combination number of the strategy parameters */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes for the trading interval */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target value for the strategy */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit from the strategy */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the strategy */,
  "profit_dd" REAL /* Profit-to-drawdown ratio */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed */,
  "percent_profitable" REAL /* Percentage of profitable trades */,
  "max_con_loss" INTEGER /* Maximum number of consecutive losing trades */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the strategy */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  "evaluation_interval" TEXT /* Interval of evaluation (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "risk_reward_ratio" REAL /* Risk-reward ratio of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtest_results" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy the backtest result belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest */,
  "backtest_config" TEXT /* Configuration used for the backtest (e.g., start date, end date, symbol) */,
  "backtest_status" TEXT /* Status of the backtest (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "backtest_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing detailed backtest results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtest_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_strategies" (
  "user_strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-strategy link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user for the strategy (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-strategy link was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-strategy link was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_strategies_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the day */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the day */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "data_symbol_type" TEXT /* Type of the symbol (e.g., stock, forex, futures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, analysis, optimization) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing the report content */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)
